# Legacy Independent Living

> Legacy Independent Living LLC. Independent living homes across the Houston, TX area for veterans and people experiencing homelessness. Residents rent a room in a real home and live independently. Live well. Live independently. Live legacy.

Contact: (713) 482-9021 | service@legacyindependentliving.net | Serving the greater Houston area, TX

## Pages
- [Legacy Independent Living | Affordable Rooms for Rent in Houston, TX](https://legacyindependentliving.net/): Affordable independent living homes and rooms for rent across Houston, TX. For veterans, working adults, and people on SSI/SSDI. Rent a room in a shared home and live on your own. Call (713) 482-9021.
- [Independent Living in Houston, TX | Affordable Rooms to Rent | Legacy](https://legacyindependentliving.net/independent-living-houston/): Affordable independent living homes across Houston, TX. Rent a room and live on your own in a stable, private home that's yours. For veterans and people rebuilding. Call (713) 482-9021.
- [Housing for Veterans in Houston, TX | Independent Living | Legacy](https://legacyindependentliving.net/veterans-housing-houston/): Affordable independent housing for veterans across Houston, TX. Rent a room and live on your own in a stable home of your own near Houston-area VA services. Call (713) 482-9021.
- [Housing After Homelessness in Houston, TX | Independent Living | Legacy](https://legacyindependentliving.net/housing-for-the-homeless-houston/): Affordable independent housing in Houston, TX for people experiencing or leaving homelessness. Rent a room and live independently, with a stable address to rebuild from. Call (713) 482-9021.
- [Our Homes | Independent Living Houses Across Houston, TX | Legacy](https://legacyindependentliving.net/our-home/): See the kind of homes Legacy Independent Living offers across the Houston, TX area: clean, comfortable houses where you rent a room and live independently. For veterans and those rebuilding.
- [How to Apply | Legacy Independent Living, Houston TX](https://legacyindependentliving.net/how-to-apply/): Moving into a Legacy independent living home in Houston, TX is simple: reach out, see what's open, tour a room, and move in. Veterans and those rebuilding welcome. Call (713) 482-9021.
- [FAQ | Legacy Independent Living, Houston TX](https://legacyindependentliving.net/faq/): Answers about Legacy Independent Living in Houston, TX: what independent living means, who it's for, where the homes are, how to move in, costs, and veterans.
- [Contact | Legacy Independent Living, Houston TX | (713) 482-9021](https://legacyindependentliving.net/contact/): Contact Legacy Independent Living for independent housing across Houston, TX. Call (713) 482-9021, email us, or send an inquiry about available rooms for veterans and those rebuilding.
